report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#465-469) and Newsletter v46 covering liquid staking/restaking guides, Australia digital assets framework, impermanent loss education, Hyperliquid perp DEX guide, and extreme fear week 3. Created 3 social card SVGs. Analytics: 652 published pages (+5 from cycle 5), F&G at 9, BTC $66,650, ETH $2,057, stablecoin supply $316B ATH.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #465: Liquid Staking Tokens — stETH vs rETH vs cbETH, yield stacking, composability (3-tweet thread, Sat May 17)
Tweet #466: Restaking & EigenLayer — $15B TVL, AVS economics, yield sustainability (3-tweet thread, Mon May 19)
Tweet #467: Australia passes Digital Assets Framework + OCC custody rule live — global regulation accelerating (single tweet, Tue May 20)
Tweet #468: Impermanent Loss explained — LP math, when liquidity providing is profitable vs holding (single tweet, Wed May 21)
Tweet #469: Extreme Fear Week 3 — infrastructure vs sentiment divergence + Hyperliquid perp DEX spotlight (3-tweet thread, Thu May 22)
Newsletter v46: 'Liquid Staking, Restaking & the New Custody Era' — DeFi yield guides, regulation roundup, 5 new pages, Hyperliquid growth (Thu May 22)
Discord/Telegram announcement: 5 new DeFi education guides + Australia/OCC regulation updates (Mon May 19)

sections.title: Social Cards Created
items: 2026-04-03-social-card-liquid-staking-restaking.svg — 1200x630 yield flow visualization (Stake ETH → LST → EigenLayer → 5-8% APY) in purple/cyan glass-morphism layout
2026-04-03-social-card-australia-crypto-regulation.svg — 1200x630 three-country regulation tracker (Australia PASSED, US OCC LIVE, CLARITY Act IN MARKUP) with green/cyan/amber cards
2026-04-03-social-card-extreme-fear-week3.svg — 1200x630 fear gauge visualization with giant '9' F&G reading, BTC/ETH/stablecoin data, 652 pages counter in red-themed layout

sections.title: Market Context Driving Content Strategy
items: BTC at $66,650, down 0.82% in 24h — selling pressure from Iran war uncertainty + Trump's address
ETH at $2,057, down 3.8% from yesterday's open — ETH/BTC ratio at 0.030 (15-month low)
Total crypto market cap $2.38T, down 2.4% in 24h, trading volume $105.4B
F&G Index at 9 — three consecutive weeks of extreme fear, longest stretch since Terra-Luna June 2022
BTC dominance at 56.2%, ETH at 10.3%
Stablecoin supply at $316B ATH — record dry powder on sidelines
Australia passed Corporations Amendment (Digital Assets Framework) Bill — first comprehensive crypto regulatory framework
OCC final rule took effect April 1 — national trust banks authorized for crypto custody
Ripple National Trust Bank charter progressing toward operational status
X platform now requires identity checks for accounts posting crypto content
MARA laid off 15% of employees — shifting toward energy infrastructure
Sonic Labs: 32.69M unclaimed S tokens to be burned after October 2026
FOMC April 28-29 remains next major catalyst — BTC moved 5%+ on each of last 4 FOMC days

sections.title: Analytics Summary — Growth Trajectories
items: 652 published page slugs total (up from 647 earlier today — 5 new learn guides in cycle 5)
5 new pages published cycle 5: Impermanent Loss, Hyperliquid Perp DEX, Restaking/EigenLayer, Liquid Staking Tokens, Stablecoins Explained
2 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE (deferred — need page.tsx scaffolds): bear market recovery, Worldcoin/World ID
93 additional learn guides remain in Degen0x staging for future publish cycles
469 total tweets drafted all-time (up from 464 in v45)
46 newsletter editions total
97+ OG images/social cards (94 prior + 3 new this cycle)

Highest growth trajectory: Fear & Greed tool (sustained extreme fear = peak organic search), Liquid staking/restaking content (EigenLayer $15B TVL driving search interest), Stablecoins guide (CLARITY Act + $316B supply ATH), Regulation content (Australia framework + OCC rule = global momentum)
